title: 12 Pcs Spherical Glass Bottles with Lid 8.5 oz Round Potion Bottles Clear Halloween Potion Bottles Decor Decorative Glass Sphere Jar for Sand Costume Props DIY Crafts (Ball Style)
description:
About this item
What You Will Get: you will receive a total of 12 pieces of clear spherical glass bottles with ball lid, the ample quantity can certainly meet your daily requirements and DIY decorative needs, and you can store the extra ones for future use
Trustworthy and Serviceable: our Halloween potion bottles decor is mainly made of quality thick glass, smooth and slippery, lightweight and comfortable for you to carry, with crafted with no bubbles, not easy to fade or tear, which can serve you for a long time; Warm note: because the sealing of bottle stopper is good, when fill the bottle with liquid, it is recommended that the distance of liquid from the bottle mouth should be above 3cm/1.2in, or the bottle stopper may pop out
Suitable Size for Application: our Halloween water bottle measures approx. 3.94 x 3.43 inches/ 10 x 8.7 cm, and the capacity is about 250 ml/ 8.5 oz, the proper size for you to pour things into it or do DIY crafts, you can fill these ball lid bottles with trinkets, such as dried flower petals, beach sand, essential oils, and other suitable items
Wide Range of Use: these round bottles can be applied as perfume bottles, message bottles, storage accessories, party gifts and more, they can also be available for making personalized crafts and decorations, and you can fill them with colorful items to make them more attractive
Thoughtful Gift: our small round bottles are made with exquisite workmanship, so that you can paint and choose them as thoughtful gifts for your family members, close friends, relatives, and other people around you, they will admire your nice taste for choosing gifts.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: My children and I got these to make potions and other items for RPGs. They worked amazing, pretty versatile and not very expensive. They’re sturdy and they just look cool on a shelfThey shipped it quickly was covered in bubble wrap each in its own box will help so much when giving them away in giftsThese little beauties are adorable. I haven’t used them yet so I can’t comment on durability (other comments), but they feel thick. The packaging couldn’t be better. There is no way any of these babies will break in transit. Each one is individually wrapped with 2 layers of bubble wrap, then individually boxed, then packaged in a bubble wrapped box, then placed into an Amazon box. The seller obviously wants their product to be received in excellent condition. So far, highly recommend.I use these as props in DnD games, players like them it give them a sense of the actual potions.Exactly as advertised. Awesome for DnD potions for fun!High quality glass! Large bottles! I did not test for leaks because I didn’t fill with liquid.Strong glass, none came broken. Even arrived earlyGot as a gift for Daughter and she loved themMy husband finally saw my full nerd potential as I squee’d in delight when these came. I made “healing potions” for our D&D group, and they were awesome. I will use these so many times!Super cute!! Love them!
reviews_1s: I’m not sure what’s happening, but the glass tops are literally popping off the bottles and will not stay put. I’ve decreased liquid levels, tried drying the topper with rubbing alcohol and nothing is working!When we opened our package, we saw that many glasses came broken. We ordered 36, and out of the 36, 16 came broken! We would like a refund on this.I got the bottle which is beautiful but the cork is not in the package when the cork was shown in the title and pictures! Disappointed..Title says it includes corks, none received. That and the fact that two bottles were broken in shipping equals a return.
